form.formComment: Comes off a 40 day let-up. Most recently sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 12 at Morphettville Parks 0-64 on February 28 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind In Love carrying 59kg at $31. The start before that won by a neck at Murray Bridge 4yo+ Bm56 February 4 over 1000m defeating In Love with 61kg at $31. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Sale 0 - 62 on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind She Daresthe Devil with 60kg at $14. Previously second-up 3rd of 12 at Sale Mdn-Sw on August 17 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind Unifies carrying 59.5kg at $31. No easier this time but not the worst.
